summary: Iteration 31 - Tested NEW Goal Tracking & Milestones feature. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed. Goals page at /goals shows Target icon heading, 7 current metric cards, create form with type dropdown/target input/presets/title/deadline, active goals with progress bars and deadline countdowns, completed milestones with golden ACHIEVED badges and 100% progress bars. Auto-completion works correctly when current_value >= target, creating milestone notifications.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/goals requires authentication (returns 401/422 without token)
Backend: GET /api/goals requires authentication
Backend: DELETE /api/goals/{id} requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/goals creates goal with goal_type, target_value, title, deadline
Backend: POST /api/goals auto-generates title if not provided
Backend: POST /api/goals rejects invalid goal_type with 400
Backend: POST /api/goals accepts all 7 valid goal types (streams, monthly_streams, countries, revenue, releases, presave_subs, collaborations)
Backend: GET /api/goals returns proper structure (goals array, active_count, completed_count, current_metrics)
Backend: GET /api/goals returns current_metrics with all 7 metric types
Backend: GET /api/goals returns goals with progress fields (current_value, progress %, completed, goal_label, unit)
Backend: GET /api/goals auto-completes goals where current_value >= target
Backend: GET /api/goals creates milestone notification when goal auto-completes
Backend: GET /api/goals calculates days_left for goals with deadlines
Backend: DELETE /api/goals/{goal_id} deletes a goal successfully
Backend: DELETE /api/goals/{goal_id} returns 404 for non-existent goal
Backend regression: GET /api/analytics/leaderboard still works
Backend regression: GET /api/analytics/revenue still works
Frontend: /goals page loads with 'Goals & Milestones' heading and Target icon
Frontend: Goals page container found (data-testid='goals-page')
Frontend: 7 current metric cards shown (Total Streams, Monthly Streams, Countries Reached, Revenue Earned, Releases Published, Pre-Save Subscribers, Collaborations)
Frontend: 'New Goal' button opens create form
Frontend: Create form has type dropdown (data-testid='goal-type-select')
Frontend: Create form has target input (data-testid='goal-target-input')
Frontend: Create form has preset buttons that update target value
Frontend: Create form has title input (data-testid='goal-title-input')
Frontend: Create form has deadline input (data-testid='goal-deadline-input')
Frontend: Creating a goal adds it to active goals list with progress bar
Frontend: Active goals show progress bar, percentage, current/target values
Frontend: Active goals show deadline countdown (e.g., '88d left')
Frontend: Completed milestones show golden ACHIEVED badge
Frontend: Completed milestones show 100% progress bar with golden gradient
Frontend: Delete button removes goals (toast: 'Goal removed')
Frontend: Goals nav item in sidebar links to /goals with Target icon
Frontend: Goals nav item highlighted when active (purple color)
Frontend: Active/completed counts shown in subtitle
critical_code_review_comments: Goals endpoint correctly validates goal_type against GOAL_TYPES constant
Auto-completion logic properly updates goal status and creates milestone notification
Days left calculation handles both ISO datetime and date-only formats
Frontend GoalCard component correctly displays all goal states (active, completed, celebrating)
Preset buttons dynamically change based on selected goal type
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing data. Admin user has: 3,120 streams, 68 monthly streams, 14 countries, $15.48 revenue, 24 releases, 3 pre-save subscribers, 0 collaborations. Existing goals: 'Hit 50k streams' (active, 6.2%), 'Reach 5 countries' (completed, 100%)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 31 tested the NEW Goal Tracking & Milestones feature. Backend endpoints: POST /api/goals (create), GET /api/goals (list with progress, auto-complete, current_metrics), DELETE /api/goals/{id}. GET /api/goals auto-completes goals where current_value >= target and creates milestone notification (type='milestone'). 7 goal types: streams, monthly_streams, countries, revenue, releases, presave_subs, collaborations. Frontend: GoalsPage at /goals with metric cards (data-testid='current-metrics'), create form (data-testid='create-goal-form'), active goals (data-testid='active-goals'), completed milestones (data-testid='completed-goals'), goal cards (data-testid='goal-card-{id}'), ACHIEVED badges (data-testid='milestone-badge-{id}'), delete buttons (data-testid='delete-goal-{id}'). Sidebar nav: data-testid='nav-goals'. Uses Phosphor Icons and sonner for toasts.

response.goal: goal object with id, user_id, goal_type, target_value, title, deadline, status, created_at

response.newly_completed: array of goal IDs that just completed

components: 7 current metric cards with icons and values
Create form with type dropdown, target input, presets, title, deadline
Active Goals section with GoalCard components
Completed Milestones section with golden ACHIEVED badges
GoalCard: icon, title, type label, deadline countdown, progress bar, current/target values, delete button
